executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification blocked by 3 external-owner residue items. Architecture-owned gates are green (checker OK, verifier zero-errors, independent pass). External: docs verifier verdict=fail (independent-stop gap), marketing independent verification fail.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Docs verifier: approve independent stop on latest fingerprint, then rerun verifier. Marketing: produce fresh primary-repo adoption measurement.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks

findings.title: Docs verifier verdict=fail despite all pre-checks passing (independent-stop gap)
findings.mechanism: Ralph docs verifier shows checker=DOCS_QUALITY_OK, editorial=DOCS_EDITORIAL_OK, agentic review=pass with zero mustFix items. The failure is strictly: candidate pass reached but independent stop approval fingerprint does not match current docs state. Consecutive verifier failures now 12 (down from 89 in prior audit), total 61. Last healthy at 2026-05-28T17:36 UTC. Last independent stop approved at 2026-05-28T09:38 UTC with fingerprint 53a01fb5bc936b96; current fingerprint ee85f2dc7e434cf5 differs.
findings.root_cause: Docs verifier produced a candidate pass but the independent-stop-approver has not re-issued approval for the current docs state fingerprint. This is a process-gate timing issue, not a content-quality regression.
findings.recommended_fix: Trigger independent-stop-approver on the current docs fingerprint so it can re-approve or reject, then rerun the verifier.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification fails closed
findings.mechanism: Marketing loop independent verification verdict=fail. Summary: 'live marketing evidence is still not healthy enough to issue a pass artifact.'
findings.root_cause: Primary-repo adoption measurement remains pending; marketing runner bundle reported as stale relative to market-intelligence artifact.
findings.recommended_fix: Refresh marketing runner bundle, produce measurable outcome evidence, rerun independent verification.

findings.title: Architecture-owned checks are fully green
findings.mechanism: Checker: AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Independent verification: qualified_pass. Architecture verifier: ok=true, zero errors. Loop integrity: agent-architecture-watchdog=ok. All architecture-owned blocker classification is correctly externalized.
findings.root_cause: Architecture path is healthy; remaining blockers are external owner-loop issues.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain direct cron inspection as topology source of truth.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology: 23 enabled, 0 disabled, 1 last-error
findings.mechanism: openclaw cron list --json: 23 total, 23 enabled, 0 disabled. One live last-error: blocked-channel-recovery (timeout). No disabled-job drift in live layer.
findings.recommended_fix: Continue direct live inspection on each watchdog run.

findings.title: Blocked-channel-recovery: ongoing timeout
findings.mechanism: Health monitor shows blocked-channel-recovery as the sole live last-error job, timing out on execution. Unblocker loop appears hung.
findings.root_cause: Likely hung on I/O or external network dependency; needs investigation or dead-letter fallback.
findings.recommended_fix: Investigate timeout root cause; consider dead-letter fallback or timeout budget reduction.

findings.title: Health monitor shows 17 live watch issues across the stack
findings.mechanism: health_monitor_latest.json records 17 watch-issues including marketing-research-daily timeout risk, blocked-channel-recovery, docs_verifier contract fail, and multiple marketing independent verification sub-issues.
findings.root_cause: Multiple external owner-loops carrying active watch issues; architecture-owned path is free of them.
findings.recommended_fix: Owner loops should address their respective watch issues; no architecture action needed.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Docs verifier: re-approve independent stop on current fingerprint (ee85f2dc7e434cf5) so verifier can close the pass gate
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: All content checks already pass; this is a process-gate gap. Fixing it clears the longest-standing external blocker.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Docs verifier marks pass, clearing one of three external blockers.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Marketing: refresh runner bundle and produce measurable primary-repo adoption evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing independent verification remains fail-closed; adoption measurement is the gating item.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clears the second external blocker if evidence passes verification.

ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Only live runtime last-error; may indicate recovery path needs attention.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed direct openclaw cron list --json: 23 total, 23 enabled, 0 disabled, 1 last-error (blocked-channel-recovery).
agent_architecture_independent_verify.py → qualified_pass, 3 external blockers (docs-verifier, docs-verdict, marketing) correctly classified as external.
agent_architecture_verifier.py → ok=true, zero errors after resolving freshness-gate race (first attempt flagged stale independent artifact, retry passed).
loop_integrity_latest.json: agent-architecture-watchdog=ok, ralph-docs-watchdog=error (verifier artifact missing pass phrase). Architecture watchdog is green.

independent_verification.summary: Architecture-owned gates are green. 3 external blockers remain: docs verifier verdict fail (independent-stop gap), marketing independent verification fail.
external_blockers: docs verifier verdict is not pass: 'fail' (independent-stop fingerprint mismatch)
marketing independent verification is not pass: 'fail'

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Docs verifier: independent-stop-approver must re-approve current fingerprint so verifier can close the pass gate.
Marketing: fresh measurable outcome evidence, then marketing independent verification rerun.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Docs verifier blocked on independent-stop gap (12 consecutive failures)
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: All content checks pass (checker OK, editorial OK, agentic review pass with zero mustFix); the gate is a process-timing issue where the independent-stop-approver fingerprint is stale relative to current docs state. This is the narrowest and most actionable external blocker.

runtime_assertions.docs_content_checks: all-pass (checker OK, editorial OK, agentic pass with zero mustFix)

notes: Architecture-owned path is green: checker AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK, verifier ok=true zero errors, independent verification qualified_pass.
2 external blockers prevent whole-stack green: docs verifier (independent-stop gap) and marketing independent verification (adoption measurement pending).

Docs verifier content-quality checks all pass; the blocker is a process-gate timing issue (independent-stop-approver fingerprint stale). This is a significant improvement from prior audit where editorial positioning-gap failures drove 89 consecutive fails.
Live cron: 23 total, 23 enabled, 0 disabled, 1 last-error.
blocked-channel-recovery remains the sole live runtime last-error residue.
8 persisted disabled jobs remain history only.
